text.title: ES Versioning Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping change type + PII presence to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Change is additive (new optional field) or breaking (rename/remove/semantic)?

conclusion.verdict: add field with default; keep version unchanged; consumers ignore extra field

branch.question: Does the new shape involve PII?
Crypto-shredding or external side table chosen?

conclusion.verdict: STOP: choose a PII policy before bumping the version
bump version + write upcaster + update catalog + invalidate snapshots; PII policy applied
bump version + write upcaster + update catalog + invalidate snapshots

text.example: change=breaking → contains_pii=false → bump to v2 + upcaster_v1_to_v2 + catalog update + snapshot invalidation + CI gate run.
